title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated to Present at the BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 25, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) will present at the 2023 BancAnalysts Association of Boston Conference on Thursday, November 2, 2023. Zach Wasserman, chief financial officer and Brant Standridge, president, Consumer and Regional Banking, are scheduled to present to analysts and investors at 11:15 AM (Eastern Time).

title: Huntington Bank Names Donnell White Chief Diversity, Equity and Inclusion Officer
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Huntington National Bank (Huntington) announced today the appointment of Donnell White as Chief Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) Officer. White will join the bank's Executive Leadership Team and oversee all DEI initiatives for the company.

title: Higher-for-longer interest rates challenge banks as mixed Q3 earnings stack up
text: The higher-for-longer interest-rate environment weighed on banks during the quarter as one central theme this earnings season, banking-industry players told MarketWatch.

title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Declares Quarterly Cash Dividends On Its Common and Preferred Stocks
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated announced that the Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend on the company's common stock (Nasdaq: HBAN) of $0.155 per common share, unchanged from the prior quarter. The common stock cash dividend is payable January 2, 2024, to shareholders of record on December 18, 2023.

title: Huntington (HBAN) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Costs Up
text: Huntington's (HBAN) Q3 earnings beat estimates on fee income growth. However, lower NII and a rise in expenses are the concern.

title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.36 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.32 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.39 per share a year ago.

title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Reports 2023 Third-Quarter Earnings
text: Q3 Results Highlighted by Sustained Core Deposit Growth, Expansion of CET1 Capital, and Strong Credit Quality 2023 Third-Quarter Highlights: Earnings per common share (EPS) for the quarter were $0.35, flat from the prior quarter, and were lower by $0.04 from the year-ago quarter. Excluding the after tax impact of Notable Items, adjusted earnings per common share were $0.36.

title: What's in the Cards for Huntington (HBAN) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Huntington (HBAN) is expected to have recorded a decline in net interest income in the third quarter of 2023 due to higher funding costs. Also, rising expenses and reserves are concerns.

title: Visible Foundation Launches First National Disability Wealth Management Platform
text: BlackRock Provides ETF Model Portfolios; Huntington National Bank Provides Custody and Sub-Accounting BOSTON , Oct. 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Visible Foundation announces the launch of Visible National Trust (www.VisibleNationalTrust.com), the first national, turnkey special needs trust platform connecting financial advisors and families that include a loved one with a disability. BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) provides ETF model portfolios, and Huntington Bank (Nasdaq:HBAN) provides custody and sub-accounting.

title: Huntington Bank Honored with ABA Foundation Community Commitment Award
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Huntington National Bank ("Huntington") was nationally recognized by the American Bankers Association Foundation for its Lift LocalSM Business program with a 2023 ABA Foundation Community Commitment Award. The ABA Foundation awarded Huntington for its efforts in the Economic Inclusion category, and presented the award during the ABA's Annual Convention on Oct. 10 in Nashville.

title: The Huntington National Bank is Nation's Top SBA 7(a) Lender by Volume for Sixth Consecutive Year
text: Huntington infuses a record of more than $1.3 billion into the economy by supporting over 7,300 small businesses COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Huntington National Bank continues to demonstrate its commitment to small businesses and the communities they call home as the nation's largest originator, by volume, of Small Business Administration (SBA) 7(a) loans for the sixth consecutive year. The designation marks a record year for Huntington, surpassing $1.3 billion in SBA 7(a) loans and helping more than 7,300 small businesses.

title: Huntington Bancshares Incorporated Announces Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Call Details
text: COLUMBUS, Ohio , Oct. 4, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Huntington Bancshares Incorporated (Nasdaq: HBAN) will release third quarter 2023 financial results prior to the market opening on Friday, October 20, 2023.  A news release and supporting financial data will be available at that time on the Investor Relations section of the company's website.
